subject: INBOX then coordinate: Organizer Onboarding via TangoTiempo
body: From Ybotman via Telegram: Run INBOX first. Then coordinate with Sarah, Fulton, and AIDI on the next mission: Automated organizer onboarding through the TangoTiempo link. The goal is to bring organizers into the calendar system automatically. As overseer, ensure cross-project standards are followed and the architecture is sound. Reply with your readiness and guidance for the team.
